content.full_text:
April 7, 2010

Jolie Houston
City Attorney, City of Los Altos
Berliner Cohen
10 Almaden Blvd., 11th Fl.
San Jose, CA 95113

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. 10-010

Dear Ms. Houston,

This letter confirms that you have withdrawn the request for advice on behalf of Councilmember Ronald D. Packard.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division
